Description
com.google.adk.planner.goap
 

  • Uses of ReplanPolicy in com.google.adk.planner.goap

    Classes in com.google.adk.planner.goap that implement ReplanPolicy
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    ReplanPolicy.FailStop
    Stop immediately on failure with an error message.
    static final record 
    ReplanPolicy.Ignore
    Ignore failures and proceed with the remaining plan as-is.
    static final record 
    ReplanPolicy.Replan
    Attempt to recompute the remaining plan from current world state.
